_readme: Single source of truth for client-facing branding (Danyal build). Fill these in when Danyal sends his details - nothing else needs to change. Read by: scripts/generate_audit_pdf.py (report header + closing CTA), audit_engine reporters (cover/footer brand line), the /audit skill (closing CTA section), and the M5 QA validator (contact-email gate). Placeholder values are safe: reports still render, they just show the placeholders.
